w:r.w:t: > Version: 2.0 | Target: Simplify 16+ waiter screens into 1 unified workspace
- **16+ distinct waiter screens** creating navigation friction
- **Complex routing**: WAITER_DASHBOARD → WAITER_MENU → WAITER_REVIEW → WAITER_PAYMENT → WAITER_RECEIPT
- **Event sourcing complexity** exposed to UI layer
- **Offline sync** as primary user concern instead of background process
- **High training overhead**: New staff require 30+ minutes onboarding
- **Zero-navigation** core workflow: Select Table → Build Order → Send/Pay
- **Background architecture**: Sync, events, offline queue invisible to users
- **2-minute onboarding**: Self-explanatory interface following Square POS patterns
- **Feature-flagged migration**: Gradual rollout without breaking existing flows
// OLD: Screen routing with complex state passing
// Single context provider replaces screen routing
* Replaces: WAITER_DASHBOARD, WAITER_MENU, WAITER_REVIEW, WAITER_PAYMENT, etc.
<header className="h-14 bg-white border-b flex items-center justify-between px-4 shrink-0">
<span className="text-xs bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800 px-2 py-1 rounded">
className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-blue-500 text-white flex items-center justify-center"
<section className="w-[20%] min-w-[240px] border-l bg-white overflow-y-auto hidden lg:block">
className={`flex-1 py-1 px-2 text-xs rounded capitalize ${
className="w-full py-2 px-4 bg-white border rounded-lg text-sm hover:bg-gray-50"
transition-all duration-150 flex flex-col items-center justify-center
<span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-4 h-4 bg-red-500 rounded-full text-white text-xs flex items-center justify-center">
* No routing - just conditional rendering based on workspace state
// View routing via state, not URL
<div className="bg-blue-50 p-3 border-b flex justify-between items-center">
const MenuItemCard: React.FC<{ item: Product; onAdd: () => void }> = ({
className="p-3 border rounded-lg text-left hover:border-blue-500 hover:bg-blue-50 transition-colors"
<span className="text-xs bg-orange-100 text-orange-800 px-2 py-0.5 rounded">
* - No separate receipt screen - print is automatic
* - Large touch targets for payment methods
// Auto-print receipt, show success briefly, return to floor
className="w-full py-4 bg-green-500 text-white text-xl font-bold rounded-lg disabled:bg-gray-300"
<div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-green-800 font-bold mb-2">
className="w-full text-left text-sm bg-white p-2 rounded border border-green-200"
const OrderStatusCard: React.FC<{ order: OrderSummary; onClick: () => void }> = ({
<span className="text-xs font-medium px-2 py-1 bg-white rounded">
throw new Error('useWorkspace must be used within WorkspaceProvider');
// Feature flag configuration for gradual rollout
